subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Thy letter hath been presented before the Throne, and whatsoever was mentioned therein concerning trials and tribulations hath been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسین نامه ات لدی العرش حاضر و آنچه در او مذکور استماع شد از بلایا و محن که
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God, @work as worship, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
